sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Search, User, LogIn, LogOut, Shield, Map } from 'lucide-react'; const WoodQuestBoard = () => { const [quests] = useState([ { id: 1, author: "Geralt_of_Rivia", title: "Griffin Menace at White Orchard", reward: "500 Gold", difficulty: "Medium" }, { id: 2, author: "Link_HY", title: "Collect 500 Rupees for Shield Repair", reward: "Hylian Shield", difficulty: "Easy" }, { id: 3, author: "Cloud_S", title: "Mako Reactor Maintenance", reward: "2000 Gil", difficulty: "Hard" }, ]); return ( /* Background: Deep Oak / Dark Wood */
{/* --- HEADER SECTION: Polished Mahogany --- */}
{/* Left Top: Profile Info */}
Adventurer_01
{/* Center Top: Label (Engraved look) */}

Quest Board

{/* Right Top: Auth Buttons */}
{/* --- MAIN CONTENT AREA --- */}
{/* Search Bar: Aged Paper Style */}
{/* Quest Feed: Parchment Cards */}
{quests.map((quest) => (
{/* Decorative "Wax Seal" icon in background */}
{quest.difficulty}
{quest.reward}

{quest.title}

Requested by: {quest.author}

))}
{/* Custom Global Styles for the Wood Grain feel */}
